characters.name: Aki
characters.description: Aki is Peg's ninja friend from Japan who is big and round and also (being a ninja in training) alongside being very agile. She can be anything she wants to be in the "Peg + Cat" show. She is a member and ninjutsu girl of Peg's girl group,The Pentagirls. She also has and carries around a round plush panda named "Harry! whom she sometimes takes wherever she goes" Aki wears a red bandana ninja mask on her face to cover her eyes along with her secret identity as a ninja girl in training, Her karate outfit is a white gi with gold line sleeves on the end on the front. She also wears a blue karate belt that helps her carry her supplies and she has on wooden Japanese shoes on her feet! Her hairstyle is black with two asian bun pigtails! Aki can do Flips, kicks, ninja jumps, (As seen in the episode "the ninja problem" where Peg, Cat, and Aki ninja jump 15 times to avoid the dragon) and many more as a ninja. She's also very calm and sometimes smart!

characters.name: Arch Villain
characters.description: The Arch Villain appears in the episodes "The Arch Villain Problem/The Straight and Narrow Problem". In the first episode, the Arch Villain wreaks havoc on the city of Mathtropolis (London, United Kingdom & Sydney, Australia) by turning everything into arches, Super Peg and Cat Guy come to the rescue. In the second episode, Super Peg and Cat Guy trail the Arch Villain, who has given up his arch ways and gone on a rampage with straight and narrow shapes instead.

characters.name: Arch Villain

characters.name: Baby Fox
characters.description: Baby Foxfirst appears in the episode, "The Baby Problem". Mrs Sheep asks Peg and Cat to babysit Baby Fox, and when he ends up building a complex block tower, Peg and Cat have to rescue him from the very top. He first appears in The Parade problem. In which he joins the nursery school for the Halloween Parade. Baby Fox seems to like spitting atCat. His next appearance is The Baby Problem. He builds a large machine andPegand Cat have to get him down. They end up building a stairway and they are successful at it. Baby Fox then appears in The Rocking Out Problem. He builds another machine which Peg, Cat, andBeethovenget stuck in. He appears in The Flatwoman Problem. And he appears in the splashing in the bathroom scene. He very briefly makes a cameo in Peg and Cat Save The World Part 2. Baby Fox can also be seen in The Scrap of Map Problem. He has a drawing that appears in the title card in the episode, "The Baby Problem".

characters.name: Beethoven
characters.description: Beethoven first appears in the episode "The Beethoven Problem". When Peg and Cat are helping their pal Ludwig Van Beethoven write a symphony, Cat laughs in a certain pattern that gives Beethoven a great idea.

characters.name: Beethoven
characters.description: Beethoven first appears in the episode "The Beethoven Problem". When Peg and Cat are helping their pal Ludwig Van Beethoven write a symphony, Cat laughs in a certain pattern that gives Beethoven a great idea.

characters.name: Big Dog
characters.description: Big Dog(real name unknown) is a large English sheepdog. The Big Dog is very affectionate, liking to lick people's faces. Despite being very doglike and not as anthropomorphised asCat, he is able to occasionally walk upright and even hop on one foot. He also has a sense of humor and likes to do impressions, join in with other people's activities, and roll in mud. The Big Dog is very affectionate, liking to lick people's faces. Despite being very doglike and not as anthropomorphised asCat, he is able to occasionally walk upright and even hop on one foot. He also has a sense of humor and likes to do impressions, join in with other people's activities, and roll in mud.

characters.name: Big Mouth
characters.description: A furry space monster with very large teeth, Big Mouth chases after anything little and yellow. Though noisy and messy, Big Mouth is totally harmless. He learnt how to use the toilet inThe Potty Problem.

characters.name: Big Mouth
characters.description: A furry space monster with very large teeth, Big Mouth chases after anything little and yellow. Though noisy and messy, Big Mouth is totally harmless. He learnt how to use the toilet inThe Potty Problem.

characters.name: Carl
characters.description: Carl is Peg's Long Lost 1,0000000,00000 year old brother. He never appered except "The Giant Problem". He always caught a cold because of eating up Honeyham sandwich. but he likes going to Camp Fairy wood. And He has been a member of Peg. He looks like Peg but without a hat. Because Carl has new friends he lies eating Monsters like Bigmouth. He also likes to eat socks and growing tea. and he really is good at blocks. Carl is pegs brother in a minor character of Peg +Cat. The Pirate Problem The Messy Room Problem

characters.name: Cat
characters.description: CatisPeg's pet, sidekick, and BFF, and the deuteragonist of the TV show,Peg + Cat. Cat is a blue-purple cat, and the best friend to Peg. He loves circles (but not as much asThe Pigloves triangles) and accompanies Peg on her adventures. Cat often inspires Peg to realize a solution to a problem without being aware of it himself. He helps Peg to calm down when she “totally freaks out“. He was inspired by Jennifer Oxley’s pet cat. Cat is voiced byDwayne Hill. He also is quite clumsy and likes to eat (even foods that most cats wouldn't eat). He knows how to count. Cat's birthday is September 1, that would make him a Virgo. Cat has blue fur. He has two gray eyes with black pupils, a gray nose and mouth, an indigo and gray tail, indigo ears, and indigo paws. Cat is a blue-purple cat, and the best friend to Peg. characters.name: Cleopatra
characters.description: Cleopatra (voiced by Patience Mpumlwana) is an Egyptian queen who first appeared inThe Cleopatra Problem. Cleopatra helps Peg find her marble and herself find her pet camel namedEpidermis. She also appeared inThe Cold Camel Problem. Cleopatra has lost Epidermis again. She is a member ofPeg's girl group,The Pentagirls.

characters.name: Jesse
characters.description: Jesseis one ofThe Teens. He is fifteen years old and the only boy Teen. Jesse is Caucasian, with short, somewhat scruffy, dark blond hair. He wears red headphones, brown shoes, black pants, and a dark blue long-sleeved shirt with a "15" on it. LikeMoraandTessa, Jesse loves pizza and has a really big appetite, but unlike them, he sometimes gets strange food cravings. For example, inThe Mega Mall Problem, he craves something "pink and circular". He doesn't seem to be as interested in trapezoidal bags as Mora and Tessa, but he does share their interest in cell phones, speaking in jive, and dancing. He's also shown some non-stereotypical interests, such as butter sculpting inThe Butter Problem. He's also shown some non-stereotypical interests, such as butter sculpting inThe Butter Problem.

characters.name: Marie Curie
characters.description: Marie CurieI don’t think she gets enough sleep.OccupationScientistBiographical informationAge35Martial StatusTaken <3 (WITH KIDS)Date of deathVery soonCause of deathradiation poisoningPhysical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleApperancesPortrayed byLinda BallantyneHer full name is Maria Salomea Skłodowska Curie Marie Curie's major discoveries include the elements polonium and radium, coining the term "radioactivity," and developing mobile X-ray units (petites Curies) during WWI, fundamentally advancing nuclear physics and medicine, earning her Nobel Prizes in both Physics (1903) and Chemistry (1911). She proved radioactivity is an atomic property and established the basis for using radiation in treatments, founding institutes like the Radium Institute in Paris. She is so radioactive, one time,she and her belongings, as well as dress, journal, and lab items had to be contained by the SCP Foundation. Marie Curie faced significant sexism

characters.name: Marie Curie
characters.description: Marie CurieI don’t think she gets enough sleep.OccupationScientistBiographical informationAge35Martial StatusTaken <3 (WITH KIDS)Date of deathVery soonCause of deathradiation poisoningPhysical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleApperancesPortrayed byLinda BallantyneHer full name is Maria Salomea Skłodowska Curie Marie Curie's major discoveries include the elements polonium and radium, coining the term "radioactivity," and developing mobile X-ray units (petites Curies) during WWI, fundamentally advancing nuclear physics and medicine, earning her Nobel Prizes in both Physics (1903) and Chemistry (1911). She proved radioactivity is an atomic property and established the basis for using radiation in treatments, founding institutes like the Radium Institute in Paris. She is so radioactive, one time,she and her belongings, as well as dress, journal, and lab items had to be contained by the SCP Foundation. Marie Curie faced significant sexism

characters.name: Marisa Kirisame
characters.description: Marisa Kirisame is a human magician and deuteragonist of the Touhou Project video game series, known as the "Ordinary Magician" who lives in the Forest of Magic and is the best friend and rival of protagonist Reimu Hakurei. She specializes in flashy light and heat magic, often using lasers and bombs, and has a compulsive habit of "borrowing" items from others. Despite a sometimes selfish and blunt personality, she is a hard worker who achieved her power through persistence, contrasting with Reimu's natural talent.

characters.name: Neighbor Ladies
characters.description: VivandConnie, voiced by Angela Teek (Viv) and Jean Yoon (Connie), are Peg's chatty middle-aged neighbors, whose houses are on either side of hers, The Neighbor Ladies are always together, always bubbly, always babbling at Peg about how she should wear more pink, smile more, be more girly. Though well-meaning, they're always getting in Peg's way. http://pbskids.org/peg/about/characters/more

characters.description: Non-talking aliends are the folks who live at the Polka dot Planet.

characters.name: One Hundred Chickens
characters.description: There are 100 total chickens who are little who live on the farm. Some are orange, and some are yellow. Although they can speak, the only one who sometimes does is the smallest yellow one, the baby littlest chicken. Though they have a habit of causing mischief, they do it "just for fun" or sit in the coop all day. In The Chicken Problem, Cat leaves the door to the coop open and all 100 chickens run wild, and it's up to Peg and Cat them back into the coop before the farmer sees.

characters.name: Patchiouli Knowledge
characters.description: Patchouli Knowledge isa popular, intelligent, but physically frail magician from the Touhou Project series, known for her vast knowledge and residence in the Scarlet Devil Mansion's library, where she serves as the librarian. She is a natural-born magician who specializes in elemental magic, but her asthma and anemia often hinder her, forcing her to rely on her assistant, Koakuma, and limiting her to the mansion's library, though she has become more active in later games

characters.name: Peg
characters.description: Peggykins Pegster Peggy Peg is a nice, easygoing, and caring artist who would do anything for her friends, although she can be easily frazzled when it looks like she might not be able to solve the problem. Despite this, Peg tends to enjoy confronting problems. She gets easily thrilled when she's making progress; breaks into song and plays her ukulele! She also seems to like animals as she's pals withCat,Big Dog, the hundred chickens, and more.

characters.description: Ramoneis a recurring character who has different jobs and talents. He enjoys helping Peg and Cat on his free time. Ramone is 10 years old and has many talents indeed.
